title: Introduction to semicolons

questions.question_content:
**What is the semicolon doing in this sentence?**

> My favorite cold dessert is not ice cream$\redD{;}$ it's frozen yogurt.

choices.label: A
choices.content: It's uniting two closely connected clauses.

choices.label: B
choices.content: It's separating items in a complex list.

note: KA serves 1/4 questions to anonymous users. Passage and sample question captured for skeleton generation.
